user.title: Shanghai Gas
user.description: Enter your Shanghai Gas account credentials and external OCR API URL. The integration sends image captchas to that API and uses the returned text.

reauth_confirm.title: Log in to Shanghai Gas again
reauth_confirm.description: The current login has expired. Enter your Shanghai Gas account credentials and OCR API URL to log in again.

error.cannot_connect_ocr: Cannot connect to the OCR API. Check that Home Assistant can reach the URL
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check mobile, password, customer id, and companyCode
error.invalid_captcha: Captcha verification failed. Check whether the OCR API result is correct
error.ocr_failed: OCR API did not return a valid captcha code. Check the OCR API response format

abort.already_configured: This customer id is already configured
